programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: It's a custom for women to give men a handkerchief before a Monster Hunt. Noah makes a request to Raeliana on that day.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Noah offers Raeliana the monster he killed. Someone approaches Vivian when her hatred for Raeliana gets more intense.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: Akane's life changes significantly when she vents her anger in an online game after being dumped and bumps into Yamada.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: Akane asks Yamada at the guild if he has seen her necklace but gets criticised for how she uses the storage instead.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: At the guild, Akane sees how close Rurihime and Yamada are, which makes her realise the feelings she has for Yamada.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Liliya, Lily's clone, attends school as her stand-in, teasing Akutsu before calling him out at lunch.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Lily's brother, Zwei, appears. Sensing Lily's uneasy smile, Akutsu follows—only to find her trembling as Zwei points a saber at her…!?

programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Due to Norea's rage, Asticassia School of Technology was destroyed. Miorine is feeling guilty now that she is returned.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Determined to stop them, Suletta heads to the front of Benerit's headquarters to board the new Gundam, Caliban.

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Driving Caliban, Suletta confronts Ericht. The rocket carrying Miorine and the others makes its way into Quiet Zero.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: Akane's life changes significantly when she vents her anger in an online game after being dumped and bumps into Yamada.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: Akane asks Yamada at the guild if he has seen her necklace but gets criticised for how she uses the storage instead.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: At the guild, Akane sees how close Rurihime and Yamada are, which makes her realise the feelings she has for Yamada.

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: Shirashi is excited about the release of a movie based on his favourite manga. Kubo invites him to watch the movie.

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: Today is Shirashi's birthday, but no classmate knows. Kubo gives him a chooclate and wishes him a happy birthday.

programme.title: WITCH WATCH
programme.desc: After two years of training, Alicia sets out for the village of Roana, where she achieves something remarkable.

programme.title: WITCH WATCH
programme.desc: Morihito tells Nico to keep her witch identity secret at the start of high school, but her magic causes trouble.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Liliya, Lily's clone, attends school as her stand-in, teasing Akutsu before calling him out at lunch.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Lily's brother, Zwei, appears. Sensing Lily's uneasy smile, Akutsu follows—only to find her trembling as Zwei points a saber at her…!?

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Otonashi asks his relatives to explain the truth about his wife's death and will give the priority to inheritance.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Rion and Ryoma recall Sumi's life. She had lived according to her father's order. Rion says she may know the truth.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Otonashi agrees with Rion's answer but Kotoko declares that Sumi didn't commit suicide and there's a real culprit!

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno recognises that Kyotani makes just as many mistakes as he does with his attacks for Aoba Josai.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Yamaguchi is subbed in and his serves are able to gain Karasuno more points against Aoba Josai.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: With Karasuno in the lead against Aoba Josai in the last set, can the team maintain their form to finally clinch victory?

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: At the guild, Akane sees how close Rurihime and Yamada are, which makes her realise the feelings she has for Yamada.

programme.title: MY LOVE STORY WITH YAMADA-KUN AT LV999
programme.desc: Akane attends her guild's offline meeting, but she is not prepared to find out who is behind Rurihime's Avatar.+.

programme.title: ONE PIECE: MARINEFORD ARC
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Raeliana rescues a bird in front of High Priest Heika, who says it is destined to die. They end up having an argument.

programme.title: WHY RAELIANA ENDED UP AT THE DUKE'S MANSION
programme.desc: Heika wants Raeliana to find him approachable by letting her call him Grandpa. Then, Raeliana's hair accessory shines...

programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.
